textTo3DPreviewTask.prompt: A destroyed wall-mounted wooden weapon rack with broken sword blades and a bent mace still hanging from damaged hooks, the rack frame is cracked and splintered, broken weapons scattered at the base, rage-destroyed armory display, game prop, isolated object, dark background, front orientation view
